commit.subject: LU-11509 ldlm: correct exports.*.ldlm_stats
commit.message:
LU-11509 ldlm: correct exports.*.ldlm_stats

- Replace 'nid_stats' with 'nid_ldlm_stats' in
  lprocfs_nid_ldlm_stats_init().
- Add test_133aa() to verify ldlm_enqueue stats.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Keguang Xu <squalfof@gmail.com>
Change-Id: Iccee828c7ee573b53a0ccd3be84f6771d67f1191
